gauge.name: Cowleech Fork Sabine River at Greenville

impacts.statement: Major out of bank flooding will occur. Major flooding will occur through Greenville downstream to below the Interstate 30 bridge. Street closures will be required, and a few rural roads will be underwater.
Moderate out of bank flooding will occur. A few rural roads closures will be needed along the river reach. Moderate flooding will occur along the river through Greenville.
Caution should be exercised near the river as water begins to flow out of the banks.
Minor out of bank flooding will occur along the river reach.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
